## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run '...'
2. With config '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or tracebacks if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Crawler-Mind version or commit: [e.g., main @ abc1234]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
